name: composio
description: Activate authenticated Composio CLI workflows across 1,000+ apps in Codex.

interface.longDescription: A thin Codex integration for the authenticated Composio CLI. Session and prompt hooks surface Composio when app work is relevant; the CLI-installed skill provides the full search, connection, execution, and scripting workflow.
defaultPrompt: Summarize my unread email and draft replies.
Turn new GitHub issues into Linear tickets.
Find this week's meetings and post a Slack brief.
